'''gamowo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:scalebar|scalebar]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-m-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:scalebar|scalebar]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| gamowo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:gæmeweth|gæmeweth]] || [[word:gæmewej|gæmewej]] || [[word:gæmewesh|gæmewesh]] || [[word:gæmewe|gæmewe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:gamomowoth|gamomowoth]] || [[word:gamomowoj|gamomowoj]] || [[word:gamomowosh|gamomowosh]] || [[word:gamomowo|gamomowo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:gamowoth|gamowoth]] || [[word:gamowoj|gamowoj]] || [[word:gamowosh|gamowosh]] || [[word:gamowo|gamowo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:gamofwoth|gamofwoth]] || [[word:gamofwoj|gamofwoj]] || [[word:gamofwosh|gamofwosh]] || [[word:gamofwof|gamofwof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gamowotho|gamowotho]] || [[word:gamowojo|gamowojo]] || [[word:gamowosho|gamowosho]] || [[word:gamowoko|gamowoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gamowoth|gamowoth]] || [[word:gamowoj|gamowoj]] || [[word:gamowosh|gamowosh]] || [[word:gamowo|gamowo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gamowothol|gamowothol]] || [[word:gamowojol|gamowojol]] || [[word:gamowoshol|gamowoshol]] || [[word:gamowokol|gamowokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gamowothotho|gamowothotho]] || [[word:gamowojojo|gamowojojo]] || [[word:gamowoshosho|gamowoshosho]] || [[word:gamowoko|gamowoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gamowothon|gamowothon]] || [[word:gamowojon|gamowojon]] || [[word:gamowoshon|gamowoshon]] || [[word:gamowokon|gamowokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gamowothoro|gamowothoro]] || [[word:gamowojoro|gamowojoro]] || [[word:gamowoshoro|gamowoshoro]] || [[word:gamowokoro|gamowokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|3a936e1}}
